title: Thermo EASY-nLC + Q Exactive: peptide LC-MS/MS (MS setup)
description: Thermo Q Exactive data-dependent MS/MS for bottom-up peptides: nanoESI positive, MS1 R 60k / MS2 R 15k, 350 to 1200 m/z (Thermo app note 21550).

payload.description: Data-dependent MS/MS setup for bottom-up peptides on a Thermo Q Exactive Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap, fed by the matching peptide nano-LC gradient (EASY-Spray nanoESI source). Polarity is positive (standard for this workflow; the source note does not state polarity literally). Spray voltage 1.9 kV, capillary (ion transfer tube) temperature 320 C. MS1 resolution 60000, MS2 resolution 15000, scan range 350 to 1200 m/z. Data-dependent acquisition with HCD: MS1 AGC target 3e6, max injection time 50 ms; MS2 AGC target 2e5, max injection time 80 ms; isolation window 1.4 m/z; dynamic exclusion 20 s. The source note does not publish a numeric Top-N or normalized collision energy (NCE); leave those to tune per instrument. Pair with the matching LC gradient template. Source: Thermo Fisher Application Note 21550, https://assets.thermofisher.com/TFS-Assets/CMD/Application-Notes/AN-21550-LC-EASY-Spray-Acclaim-PepMap-C18-75cm-Column-AN21550-EN.pdf . Representative starting-point method, verify against the source and tune per instrument and sample.

source.other_notes: Thermo labels: spray voltage 1.9 kV; capillary (ion transfer tube) temperature 320 C. EASY-Spray nanospray source (no sheath/aux/sweep gas).
